questionText: When you see a solid yellow line on your side of the center line, you must:
questionTextZh: 当你看到中心线你这一侧有实黄线时，你必须：
explanation: A solid yellow line on your side means you cannot pass. You may only cross a solid yellow line to turn left into a driveway or to make a U-turn when it is safe and legal.
explanationZh: 你这一侧的实黄线意味着禁止超车。只有在安全且合法的情况下，才能越过实黄线左转进入车道或掉头。
dmvManualReference: California Driver Handbook 2026, Page 32, Section: Pavement Markings

options.optionTextZh: 只能超越摩托车和自行车

questionText: At an intersection with a stop sign, you must:
questionTextZh: 在有停车标志的路口，你必须：
explanation: You must come to a complete stop at a stop sign. Stop at the limit line or crosswalk. If there is no limit line or crosswalk, stop before entering the intersection.
explanationZh: 你必须在停车标志处完全停车。在停止线或人行横道处停车。如果没有停止线或人行横道，在进入路口前停车。
dmvManualReference: California Driver Handbook 2026, Page 45, Section: Traffic Signs

options.optionText: Slow down and proceed if clear

questionText: You must dim your high-beam headlights within ___ feet of an oncoming vehicle:
questionTextZh: 你必须在距离迎面而来的车辆 ___ 英尺内将远光灯调暗：
explanation: You must dim your high beams to low beams within 500 feet of an oncoming vehicle. You should also dim your lights when following another vehicle within 300 feet.
explanationZh: 你必须在距离迎面而来的车辆500英尺内将远光灯调至近光灯。当你跟随另一辆车300英尺内时，也应该调暗灯光。
dmvManualReference: California Driver Handbook 2026, Page 67, Section: Night Driving
